Parameter.label: Class of entry to be created
Trace Message
Parameter.value: "{{RTDS}} Inserting new call flow for SourceId " & p_sSourceId & "(Version=" & sVersion & ")"

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "{{RTDS}} Attribute creating failed. Key=" & sDsPath & "; Attribute=" & sDsAttribute & "; Value=" & sDsValue

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "{{RTDS}} Import Ready. : " & Test(iErrorCount > 0, "Number of errors =" & toS(iErrorCount) & ".", "No Errors.")

Parameter.label: Class of entry to be created
Class of entry to be created
Trace Message
Parameter.value: "{{RTDS}} Old key deleted failed: " & GetAt(lsPaths, iIndex)

Parameter.label: List of strings to be processed
List of strings to be processed
SQL Text to be Executed on Logging Server

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: "EXEC [NALLO_APP].[rtds].[sp_AddHistory] " & SQLStr(sLogData) & ", " & SQLStr(MakeDateTimeTZ(GetYearUTC($Now), GetMonthUTC($Now), GetDayUTC($Now), GetHourUTC($Now), GetMinuteUTC($Now), GetSecondUTC($Now), ""))

Parameter.label: SQL Text to be Executed on Logging Server

Step.label: sSQL
Step.notes: "EXEC [NALLO_APP].[rtds].[sp_AddHistory] " & SQLStr("DELETE|" & p_sSourceId) & ", " & SQLStr(MakeDateTimeTZ(GetYearUTC($Now), GetMonthUTC($Now), GetDayUTC($Now), GetHourUTC($Now), GetMinuteUTC($Now), GetSecondUTC($Now), ""))

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: "EXEC [NALLO_APP].[rtds].[sp_AddHistory] " & SQLStr("DELETE|" & p_sSourceId) & ", " & SQLStr(MakeDateTimeTZ(GetYearUTC($Now), GetMonthUTC($Now), GetDayUTC($Now), GetHourUTC($Now), GetMinuteUTC($Now), GetSecondUTC($Now), ""))
